Browser → App Service (this page) → JWT → Function App /api/login → Function App /api/getProducts → /api/placeOrder → /api/processPayment → Azure SQL
Stage 01 MVP — Custom JWT auth + cart + simulated payment. Stage 02 adds Entra Easy Auth.
